action_set_definitions.name: get_declaration_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metadata and state of a specific import declaration, including line items, current status, and HS codes.

declaration_id.description: The unique ID of the declaration (e.g., DEC-ROO-882).

action_set_definitions.name: retrieve_document_content
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the text content or metadata of supporting documents attached to a declaration, such as the Certificate of Origin (CoO), Invoices, or Bill of Lading.

declaration_id.description: The declaration ID associated with the documents.

document_type.description: The type of document to retrieve.

example_output.content: HS Code listed: 8413.11. Origin: Country X. Invoiced by: HK Entity...

action_set_definitions.name: consult_fta_handbook
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Handbook on Preferential Rules of Origin for specific Product-Specific Rules (PSR) or consignment requirements (Non-manipulation).

fta_name.description: The name of the Free Trade Agreement.

hs_code.description: The HS code to look up (6-digit level recommended).

topic.description: The specific regulatory topic to research.

example_output.rule_description: A change to subheading 8413.11-8413.80 from any other heading...
example_output.compliance_requirement: Evidence of customs supervision in transshipment port required.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_and_record_discrepancy
action_set_definitions.description: Logs an identified discrepancy or validation result into the environment state and updates the validation_errors list.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the discrepancy and its resolution.

is_resolved.description: Whether the discrepancy has been legally accounted for.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_review
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the total calculated duties and sets the final review status of the declaration.

final_status.description: The final determination for the tariff claim.

adjusted_duty_total.description: The final calculated duty amount after the review.

state_description.declaration_id: Unique identifier for the import declaration document.
state_description.review_status: Current workflow stage of the declaration (e.g., PENDING, IN_REVIEW, FLAGGED, APPROVED).
state_description.line_items: List of goods being imported, including HS codes, declared value, and quantities.
state_description.validation_errors: A list of identified discrepancies or compliance issues found during the session.
state_description.total_calculated_duties: The running total of calculated taxes and duties based on current item validations.
state_description.supporting_documents: List of attached files like Invoices or Certificates of Origin and their verification status.
